hooks.command: python -c "import sys, importlib.util, json; ok=sys.version_info>=(3,9); mcp=importlib.util.find_spec('mcp') is not None; msgs=[]; (not ok) and msgs.append(f'Python 3.9+ required (found {sys.version.split()[0]}) - upgrade at https://python.org'); (not mcp) and msgs.append('mcp package missing - run: pip install mcp[cli]'); out={'decision':'approve','reason':'WARNING - File Commander prerequisites not met: '+' | '.join(msgs)} if msgs else {'decision':'approve'}; print(json.dumps(out))"
